  "description": "Mitchy&rsquo;s Grill &amp; Foodies Restaurant is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Handler

Job Location: Chevron, Lagos

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: michysfoodies@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Are you passionate about food, service, and working in a fast-paced environment? Join our growing team!&nbsp;
	For more enquiries, WhatsApp: +234 812 037 3656.

Social Media Handler Job at Mitchy’s Grill & Foodies Restaurant




        
    

        
        Mitchy’s Grill & Foodies Restaurant is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Handler

Job Location: Chevron, Lagos

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note
     

            
    




	Are you passionate about food, service, and working in a fast-paced environment? Join our growing team! 
	For more enquiries, WhatsApp: +234 812 037 3656.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Scholarship Support Coordinator (Volunteer) Job at Pealim Foundation




        
    

        
        The Pealim Foundation (Pealim Foundation for Socio-Economic Development) is a Nigerian registered non-profit. Pealim Foundation is a Non-Profit Organization committed to help the Underprivileged Children & Widows' Live Well.

We invite applications for the position below:

Job Position: Scholarship Support Coordinator (Volunteer)

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements
     

            
    




	Interested applicant(s) should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accounting Teacher",
  "description": "Arrupe Jesuit College is a non-profit co-educational boarding Catholic and Jesuit secondary school that welcomes young men and women of diverse cultural and religious backgroundsand provides them with a comprehensive education and formation to lead meaningful lives with and for others, and to work for the good of God&rsquo;s creation through the service of love and justice.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Teacher
Job Location: Abbi, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We seek a highly qualified and experienced Accounting teacher to join our team. The successful candidate will teach Accounting to students at the secondary school level, develop and implement engaging lesson plans, and assess student progress.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong passion for Accounting, excellent teaching skills, and must have the ability to communicate effectively with students and colleagues.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement engaging and age-appropriate lesson plans that cover a diverse range of Accounting topics, using a variety of instructional methods and resources.
	Facilitate hands-on learning activities and project-based assignments to reinforce the theoretical concepts taught in the classroom.
	Assess students&#39; progress and provide regular feedback to help them improve their understanding, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.
	Maintain detailed records of student performance, attendance, and any disciplinary issues.
	Collaborate with other teachers to ensure a cohesive and integrated curriculum.
	Stay up-to-date with the latest trends, research, and best practices.
	Contribute to the overall development and enrichment of the school community, including participating in extracurricular activities.


Education and Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting or a related field.
	2-3 years of experience teaching Accounting or a related subject at the secondary level.
	Teaching certification.
	Demonstrated success in creating and implementing effective lesson plans and assessments.


Other Requirements:


	Passion for teaching and a genuine interest in helping students develop a deeper understanding of the world around them.
	Maintain a safe and organized learning environment in the classroom.
	Willingness to stay up-to-date with the latest trends and developments in Accounting education.
	Strong collaboration and teamwork skills to work effectively with other faculty members.
	Commitment to the school&#39;s mission and values.


Skills:


	In-depth knowledge of the core areas of Accounting.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to engage students and convey information effectively.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities to manage multiple tasks and deadlines.
	Creativity and problem-solving skills to develop innovative lesson plans and activities.
	Patience and adaptability to cater to the diverse learning needs of students.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications, CV, and scanned copies of their credentials to: hr@arrupejesuits.org and copied to: jobs@arrupejesuits.org using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accounting Teacher Job at Arrupe Jesuit College




        
    

        
        Arrupe Jesuit College is a non-profit co-educational boarding Catholic and Jesuit secondary school that welcomes young men and women of diverse cultural and religious backgroundsand provides them with a comprehensive education and formation to lead meaningful lives with and for others, and to work for the good of God’s creation through the service of love and justice.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Teacher
Job Location: Abbi, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We seek a highly qualified and experienced Accounting teacher to join our team. The successful candidate will teach Accounting to students at the secondary school level, develop and implement engaging lesson plans, and assess student progress.
	The ideal candidate will have a strong passion for Accounting, excellent teaching skills, and must have the ability to communicate effectively with students and colleagues.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement engaging and age-appropriate lesson plans that cover a diverse range of Accounting topics, using a variety of instructional methods and resources.
	Facilitate hands-on learning activities and project-based assignments to reinforce the theoretical concepts taught in the classroom.
	Assess students' progress and provide regular feedback to help them improve their understanding, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.
	Maintain detailed records of student performance, attendance, and any disciplinary issues.
	Collaborate with other teachers to ensure a cohesive and integrated curriculum.
	Stay up-to-date with the latest trends, research, and best practices.
	Contribute to the overall development and enrichment of the school community, including participating in extracurricular activities.


Education and Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or a related field.
	2-3 years of experience teaching Accounting or a related subject at the secondary level.
	Teaching certification.
	Demonstrated success in creating and implementing effective lesson plans and assessments.


Other Requirements:


	Passion for teaching and a genuine interest in helping students develop a deeper understanding of the world around them.
	Maintain a safe and organized learning environment in the classroom.
	Willingness to stay up-to-date with the latest trends and developments in Accounting education.
	Strong collaboration and teamwork skills to work effectively with other faculty members.
	Commitment to the school's mission and values.


Skills:


	In-depth knowledge of the core areas of Accounting.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to engage students and convey information effectively.
	Strong organizational and time-management abilities to manage multiple tasks and deadlines.
	Creativity and problem-solving skills to develop innovative lesson plans and activities.
	Patience and adaptability to cater to the diverse learning needs of students.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Applications, CV, and scanned copies of their credentials to: [email protected] and copied to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Operations Officer",
  "description": "Cynosure Professional Services is renowned for excellent Human resources management and training programs delivered by an enviable team of qualified and highly experienced professionals who are passionate and dedicated with a commitment to delivering real business benefits. We provide holistic Human Resources Recruitment &amp; Outsourcing Services that cover end to end HR services.

Our mission is to provide innovative training and development solutions that will enable our clients to maximize the growth of human capital in their organization as well as transforming learning and training challenges into DYNAMIC business

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Operations Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Facility Operations Officer to oversee daily cleaning operations across client locations, supervise cleaning teams, ensure service quality, build strong client relationships, support business development efforts, and ensure the successful delivery of all cleaning and facility services.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate cleaners across multiple client locations.
	Conduct routine and surprise site inspections to ensure quality service delivery.
	Ensure cleaning services meet company standards and client expectations.
	Monitor staff attendance, punctuality, grooming, and performance.
	Resolve operational issues and client complaints promptly.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients to encourage contract renewals and long-term retention.
	Conduct regular client visits and obtain feedback on service quality.
	Identify opportunities to upsell additional cleaning and facility services to existing clients.
	Support client acquisition by identifying prospects, attending site inspections, and participating in business development activities.
	Coordinate staff deployment, schedules, and emergency replacements where necessary.
	Ensure the proper use, storage, and accountability of cleaning equipment and materials.
	Maintain accurate operational records, inspection reports, and inventory updates.
	Enforce health, safety, and company operational standards across all client sites.
	Capture clear before-and-after photos and short videos of completed projects using a smartphone for reporting and marketing purposes.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly operational reports.
	Perform any other operational duties assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in any relevant discipline.
	Minimum of 2 years&rsquo; experience in facility management, commercial cleaning, hospitality, or operations.
	Strong leadership and team supervision skills.
	Excellent communication and client relationship management skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple client locations.
	Good report writing and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to take quality photos and videos using a smartphone.
	Must reside in or around Lekki and be willing to travel within Lagos for site inspections.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@cynosureng.com using &quot;Facility Operations Officer &ndash; Lekki&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Facility Operations Officer Job at Cynosure Professional Services




        
    

        
        Cynosure Professional Services is renowned for excellent Human resources management and training programs delivered by an enviable team of qualified and highly experienced professionals who are passionate and dedicated with a commitment to delivering real business benefits. We provide holistic Human Resources Recruitment & Outsourcing Services that cover end to end HR services.

Our mission is to provide innovative training and development solutions that will enable our clients to maximize the growth of human capital in their organization as well as transforming learning and training challenges into DYNAMIC business

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Operations Officer
     

            
    



Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Facility Operations Officer to oversee daily cleaning operations across client locations, supervise cleaning teams, ensure service quality, build strong client relationships, support business development efforts, and ensure the successful delivery of all cleaning and facility services.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate cleaners across multiple client locations.
	Conduct routine and surprise site inspections to ensure quality service delivery.
	Ensure cleaning services meet company standards and client expectations.
	Monitor staff attendance, punctuality, grooming, and performance.
	Resolve operational issues and client complaints promptly.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing clients to encourage contract renewals and long-term retention.
	Conduct regular client visits and obtain feedback on service quality.
	Identify opportunities to upsell additional cleaning and facility services to existing clients.
	Support client acquisition by identifying prospects, attending site inspections, and participating in business development activities.
	Coordinate staff deployment, schedules, and emergency replacements where necessary.
	Ensure the proper use, storage, and accountability of cleaning equipment and materials.
	Maintain accurate operational records, inspection reports, and inventory updates.
	Enforce health, safety, and company operational standards across all client sites.
	Capture clear before-and-after photos and short videos of completed projects using a smartphone for reporting and marketing purposes.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly operational reports.
	Perform any other operational duties assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in any relevant discipline.
	Minimum of 2 years’ experience in facility management, commercial cleaning, hospitality, or operations.
	Strong leadership and team supervision skills.
	Excellent communication and client relationship management skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple client locations.
	Good report writing and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to take quality photos and videos using a smartphone.
	Must reside in or around Lekki and be willing to travel within Lagos for site inspections.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Facility Operations Officer – Lekki" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
